purpose: Bounded multi-criteria process-design utility score for comparing model-generated flow designs.
primary_assumption: Higher productivity is valuable, but cannot hide de-intensification, poor operability, impractical geometry, or safety flags.
notes: Productivity uses log scaling from manuscript low to high productivity and saturates above the high-productivity reference.
Intensification score is zero if residence time is not shorter than batch and full at >=3x reduction.
This is a transparent decision utility, not an experimentally validated absolute optimum.
